delete_dialog.title: Delete this provider?
delete_dialog.description: This action cannot be undone. The provider will be permanently deleted.

form.no_types: No types available. Please configure a template first.
form.no_config: No additional configuration for this provider type.
form.type_not_in_template: Provider type {{type}} is not in the template list. You can continue using it or select another type.
form.error_matcher_placeholder:
Example (one per line or semicolon-separated):
"status":"439"
"status":"500"
API Token has expired
form.error_matcher_hint: Any matched sample is treated as an error. Useful for channels that return errors with HTTP 200.

models_dialog.title: {{name}} Model List
models_dialog.desc: All available models for this provider
